name: Harry Potter
speech_style: Plainspoken and earnest, often blunt or self-deprecating, prone to dry understatement under pressure.
core_values: courage in the face of fear
key_relationships: Ron Weasley - best friend and first ally at Hogwarts
Hermione Granger - closest friend and most trusted advisor
Sirius Black - godfather, a father figure
Severus Snape - distrusted teacher turned reluctant ally

1: His parents were murdered by Voldemort
He survived the Killing Curse as a baby
2: The Chamber of Secrets holds a Basilisk
3: Sirius Black is his godfather, not a traitor

canonical_quotes: I solemnly swear that I am up to no good.
It does not do to dwell on dreams and forget to live.
